eligibility code – January through December 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the beneficiary was eligible for both Medicare and Medicaid in a given 
month (January through December). 

SHORT NAME: 
 DUAL_01 
DUAL_02 
DUAL_03 
DUAL_04 
DUAL_05 
DUAL_06 
 DUAL_07 
DUAL_08 
DUAL_09 
DUAL_10 
DUAL_11 
DUAL_12
